description_long: This is a necklace displayed on a contoured jewelry bust stand. The necklace features a series of irregularly shaped beads or stones, possibly semi-precious, strung together in a single strand. The beads vary slightly in size and shape, giving the piece a natural, organic appearance. The bust stand is smooth and matte, designed to highlight the necklace's details and drape. The necklace's clasp and stringing material are not visible from the front, suggesting a seamless presentation. The overall look is understated yet elegant, suitable for both casual and formal urban settings.
description: A beaded necklace with irregular stones displayed on a smooth, matte bust stand. The necklace has a natural, organic look with subtle elegance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full necklace draped over the bust, with all beads visible and the central drop most prominent.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the bust and the way the necklace curves around the neck.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back of the bust and the necklace's string or chain resting along the top edge.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, emphasizing the necklace's drape and the bust's smooth contour.
